# web-media-getter

> web-media-getter is a Claude Code skill that runs one query across free image, video, and GIF APIs and returns a single license-tagged list of results.

## Install (Claude Code)
- Add the marketplace: `/plugin marketplace add connerkward/ckw-skills`
- Install this plugin: `/plugin install web-media-getter@connerkward`

## Links
- Canonical README: https://github.com/connerkward/web-media-getter-skill
- Marketplace (all of Conner K. Ward's skills + MCP servers): https://github.com/connerkward/ckw-skills

## Optional
- Author: Conner K. Ward — https://github.com/connerkward
